Error 404

This panel is not in the registry.

Every application in the network announces its panels to the core. This one never did — because it doesn't exist. Nothing broke; the address is simply wrong.

Independent project — incorporation ahead.

Source-visible showcase, not open source. All rights reserved.

Built with a 100-line Python baker. No cookies, no trackers, no external requests.
